speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Before we go, our overview story comes from the beautiful chaos of unexpected friendship. Sometimes life throws you a curveball that changes everything.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] <cite index="49-5,49-6,49-7,49-8">Brian Buckbee's life was turned upside down by a mysterious illness while traveling through Asia. He felt isolated and in constant pain, but during neighbourhood walks, he found an injured pigeon and took it home to nurse back to health - a decision that changed his life forever.</cite>

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] <cite index="49-1,49-9">Together, Brian and Two-Step the pigeon formed an unexpected friendship full of heartwarming surprises.</cite> Puts it all in perspective.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] That's The Bright Side. I'm Jamie Chen.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And I'm Alex Mercer. ParkSyde rolls on.
